---
title: "About Me"
---

## 👋 Hello!

My name is Jin Liu.

I am currently pursuing my MSBA degree at UCSD, focusing on applying data to solve real-world business problems.

### 🎯 What I'm Learning
- Data analysis with Python
- Marketing analytics
- Building websites with Quarto

### 🚀 Goals
I hope to work in strategy or business analytics roles in tech companies like Xiaohongshu or Douyin.

### 😄 Fun Fact
I built this website using Quarto and customized it myself!
